verses.text: Tua ciangin amah in a innsung nasempa thu pia a, “Hih mite' van sungah amau' puakzawh zahzah an guang in la, amau' sum ciat a van gong ciat uhah koih in
Ka ngun hai pen an leina dinga a sum tawh a moipen' van gongah koihsak in,” a ci hi. Amah in Josef' gen bangin a hih hi
Zingsang khuavak phetin a late uh tawh mite kisawlkhia hi

Amaute a pai khit, ahih hangin khuapi panin a nai lai-in, Josef in ama innsung nasempa kiangah, “Kithawi in la, mite va delh in. Amaute na phak ciangin amaute kiangah, ‘Bang hangin a hoih pen a sia tawh hong thuk na hi uh hiam? Bang hangin ka topa' ngun hai gu na hi uh hiam
Ka topa in hih hai sung panin dawnin, hih tawh amah in thu thei hilo ahi hiam? Hih bangin na gamtat manun na khial uh hi,’ va ci in,” a ci hi
Amah in amaute a phak ciangin amaute kiangah hih thute a gen hi
Amaute in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin ka topa in thu hih bang hong gen na hi hiam? Na nasemte, tua banga gamta ding hi dek peuhmah lo hi
En in, ka van gong uha ka muh uh sumte, Kanaan gam panin nang kiangah kong puak kik uh hi. Tua ahih teh na topa' inn panin ngun hita leh kham hita leh bangci guk ding ka hi uh hiam
Na nasemte' sung pan tua hai a kimuhna penpen kithat hen; kote zong ka topa' sila ka hi ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Amah in, “Na cih bang uh hi ta hen: A kimuhna penpenpa ka sila hi ding a, no a dangteng mawh na baang kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a milipin a van uh leilakah ngasuk uh a, a milipin a van uh suah hi
Amah in zong a, a hampen panin kipanin a moipen tawh tawp a, Benjamin' van sungah a hai kimu hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a puan uh balkekin, a late uh a van suan ciatin, khuapi-ah hong kileh kik uh hi
Judah leh a sanggamte, Josef' inn-ah a tun' ciangin, amah tua lai mahah na omlai hi. Ama mai leilakah amaute kun uh hi
Josef in amaute kiangah, “Note' gamtatna a bangci gamtat ahi hiam? Kei bang ahi mi in thu ka theihna theilo na hi uh hiam?” na ci hi

Judah in, “Ka topa tungah hong bangci gen ding ka hi uh hiam? Bang thu gen ding ka hi uh hiam? Tua ahih kei leh ko bangci kiphel theih ding ka hi uh hiam? Pasian in na nasemte' mawhna mukhia hi. En in, kote leh hai a kimuhnapa zong, ka topa' sila ka hi uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amah in, “Tua bangin hi deklo ding hi. Hai a kimuhna mipa bek ka sila hi ding hi. No a dangte ahih leh, na pa' kiang uhah nuamtakin ciah un,” a ci hi.

Tua ciangin ama kiangah Judah hong paito-in, “Ka topa aw, hong thum ing. Na nasempa, nang tungah kam khat thu hong gensak in la, na nasempa tungah na hehna hong sosak kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang pen Faro mahmah tawh a kibang na hi hi
Ka topa in a nasemte nong dong a, ‘Pa hita leh sanggam pasal dang hita leh na nei uh hiam?’ nong ci hi

Kote in ka topa uh kiangah, ‘Kote in a teek pa khat leh a teek zawhin a neih sanggam pasal moilai khat ka nei uh hi. Ama sanggampa si a, a nu' tate sung pan amah bek omlai hi. A pa in amah it mahmah hi,’ kong ci uh hi
Tua ciangin nangmah in na nasemte kiangah, ‘Ka mit tawh amah ka muh theihna dingin kei kiangah amah hong tonpih suk un,’ nong ci hi
Kote in ka topa uh kiangah, ‘Tangvalpa in a pa nusia theilo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a pa nusia leh a pa si ding hi,’ kong ci uh hi
Tua ciangin nangmah in na nasemte kiangah, ‘Note tawh na sanggam uh a moipen hong paisuk khop kei leh ka mai nong mu nawn kei ding uh hi,’ nong ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin na nasem ka pa uh kiangah ka ciahkik uh ciangin ka topa' thugente ama kiangah ka gen uh hi
Ka pa un, ‘Paikikin eite-a' ding an tawm va lei un,’ hong cih ciangin

kote in, ‘Ka paisuk kei ding uh hi. Ka sanggam moipen uh ko tawh hong paikhawm leh ka paisuk bek ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka sanggam moipen uh ko tawh hong pai kei leh mipa' mai ka mu kei ding uh hi,’ ka ci uh hi
Tua ciangin na nasem ka pa un kote kiangah, ‘Ka zi in kei tawh tapa nih a neih na thei uh hi
Khat in kei hong nusia khin a, amah kibalzan khin taktak hi, ka ci hi. Tua huna kipan amah ka mu nawn kei hi
Hih a khat zong kei kiang panin na lak uh a, ama tungah siatna a tun' leh, dahna tawh ka sam kangte Leinuai-ah na paipih suk ding uh hi,’ hong ci hi
“Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, na nasem ka pa uh kiangah ka ciah uh ciangin, tangvalpa kote tawh hong ciah kei leh, ama lungsim khempeuh tangvalpa' tungah om ahih manin
kote tawh tangvalpa a ciahlohna a muh ciangin amah si ding hi. Na nasemte in na nasem ka pa uh' sam kangte dahna tawh Leinuai-ah ka paipih ding uh hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh na nasem keimah pen tangvalpa-a' dingin ka pa' tungah a kikham ka hi a, ‘Nang kiangah amah kong ciahpih kik kei leh tua mawhsakna nangma muhna-ah ka nuntak tawntungin ka thuak ding hi,’ ka ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi. Ka topa' sila dingin tangvalpa' tangin na nasempa hong omsak in la, a sanggamte tawh tangvalpa ciahkik sak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh tangvalpa kei tawh hong ton kei leh ka pa kiangah bangci ciahkik thei ding ka hi hiam? Ka pa' tungah a tung ding siatna ka thuakzo kei ding hi,” a ci hi.
